shorts.title_distilled: ​‘The Office US’ cast: Where the Dunder Mifflin folks are now​.
shorts.description: Over ten years since the last episode, ‘The Office US’ is still one of the all-time favorites. This mockumentary about the oddball staff at Dunder Mifflin in Scranton, Pennsylvania, first hit screens in 2005 and stuck around for nine seasons, wrapping up in 2…

Police say the parade is set to start at 11:45 a.m. and to protect spectators and participants, all Downtown Scranton roads from Penn Avenue to [...]
shorts.content_distilled: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY  — The Scranton Police Department announced that road closures will be in place on Saturday, March 14, in anticipation of the upcoming Scranton Saint Patrick's Parade.
